summary: This is an extremely brief news blurb noting that Microsoft featured Lookout (a search tool) on their platform, with a quick correction that it was actually on MSN Sandbox rather than the Download Center. The post captures a minor industry moment with minimal commentary.
key_points: Microsoft promoted the Lookout search tool on MSN Sandbox
Joel initially reported the wrong Microsoft property and issued a quick correction
key_insight: A trivial news snippet about Microsoft's promotion of the Lookout tool, too brief to convey a substantive argument.
